item.title: Mudlarking The River Thames To Discover Plenty Of Royal Marines Buttons
item.description: A journey along the low tide of the Thames reveals a remarkable collection of Royal Marines buttons lost to the river over centuries. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Mudlarking The River Thames To Discover Plenty Of Royal Marines Buttons
media:content.media:description: A journey along the low tide of the Thames reveals a remarkable collection of Royal Marines buttons lost to the river over centuries. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Finding A Stash Of Jewelry!
item.description: We uncover the hidden gems buried beneath the silt. Every piece tells a story of the people who walked these shores. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Finding A Stash Of Jewelry!
media:content.media:description: We uncover the hidden gems buried beneath the silt. Every piece tells a story of the people who walked these shores. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Saved Just Before the Tide Took It!!
item.description: A close call unfolds as an item is recovered moments before the tide comes in. This video captures the timing, effort, and quick thinking involved. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Saved Just Before the Tide Took It!!
media:content.media:description: A close call unfolds as an item is recovered moments before the tide comes in. This video captures the timing, effort, and quick thinking involved. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Mystery Coin Found in the Mud
item.description: A coin discovery raises questions about its origin and history. This video explores the find, its features, and what it could reveal about the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Mystery Coin Found in the Mud
media:content.media:description: A coin discovery raises questions about its origin and history. This video explores the find, its features, and what it could reveal about the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: This Squirrel Seal Is Linked To An Iconic Brand
item.description: Discover the story of a squirrel seal and its connection to an iconic brand, exploring its history, design, and lasting influence. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: This Squirrel Seal Is Linked To An Iconic Brand
media:content.media:description: Discover the story of a squirrel seal and its connection to an iconic brand, exploring its history, design, and lasting influence. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
